title: HotbarPriorityChanger
description: A mod that can change your hotbar slot's priority
body:
This mod is made for you to be able to do the things [Marlowww](https://www.youtube.com/@Marlowww) said in the video [How Your Hotbar Order Impacts Minecraft PVP](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RVmQnDtNxKo) without reordering your entire hotbar.

If you want to have your axe in a bigger priority slot, than your sword but your axe is in the slot 1, and your sword is in slot 9, you can simply do it by typing **/changehotbarpriority 2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,1**

So in /changehotbarpriority the later your slot's number is the bigger priority it gets.

_Theese numbers are not your hotkeys_
